DialogueSystem
Table of Contents

Class DialogueManager

Namespace
WolverineSoft.DialogueSystem

Primary Component for operating the Backend of the Dialogue System. Primary functions are BeginDialogue(DialogueAsset, string) and AdvanceDialogue(AdvanceContext). EndDialogue() Is only to be used when ending an interaction prematurely. Also provides interfaces for values and keywords

public class DialogueManager : MonoBehaviour, IVariableContext
Inheritance
object
DialogueManager
Implements
IVariableContext

public readonly UnityEvent<AdvanceContext> AdvancedDialogue

UnityEvent<AdvanceContext>

optionIndexes 

public List<int> optionIndexes

Field Value

List<int>

Properties

IsReadOnly 

public bool IsReadOnly { get; }

Property Value

bool

Methods

AdvanceDialogue()

Retrieve the next dialogue with strict types using default context. Primarily used to get the first dialogue. Returns null if end of dialogue is reached.

public DialogueInfo AdvanceDialogue()

Returns

DialogueInfo

AdvanceDialogue(AdvanceContext)

Retrieve the next dialogue using context about the user's interaction. Returns null if end of dialogue is reached.

public DialogueInfo AdvanceDialogue(AdvanceContext context)

Parameters

context AdvanceContext

Returns

DialogueInfo

BeginDialogue(DialogueAsset, string)

Begin a dialogue using the DialogueAsset to be started

public void BeginDialogue(DialogueAsset dialogueAsset, string startName = "")

Parameters

dialogueAsset DialogueAsset
startName string

EndDialogue()

Prematurely end dialogue

public void EndDialogue()

GetDialogueParamsType()

Gets type of current Dialogue Settings

public Type GetDialogueParamsType()

Returns

Type

GetDialogueParams<T>()

Gets the Dialogue Settings for the current dialogue

public T GetDialogueParams<T>() where T : DialogueParameters

Returns

T

Type Parameters

T

RefreshDialogue()

Retrieve the information about the current dialogue again. Used if you want to account for changes in conditional choice options

public DialogueInfo RefreshDialogue()

Returns

DialogueInfo

RefreshDialogue(AdvanceContext)

Retrieve the information about the current dialogue again. Used if you want to account for changes in conditional choice options

public DialogueInfo RefreshDialogue(AdvanceContext context)

context AdvanceContext
